title: primula × boni-auxilii
intro: Primula × boni-auxilii is a hybrid plant species, a cross between Primula auricula and Primula marginata, known for its unique and attractive flowers. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Primula × boni-auxilii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reduced inflammation and improved digestion. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
